SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-19-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-19-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFFS DAVID S POPKIN IS PRESENT AND MEGAN A IIDA IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT I.Q. DATA INTERNATIONAL, INC. IS REPRESENTED BY LANCE MARTIN AND JESSICA NGUYEN BOTH APPEARING BY ZOOM. DEFENDANT IS CONTESTING THE JURISDICTION OF THE COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-19-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF POPKIN, DAVID S IIDA, MEGAN A RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT I.Q DATA INTERNATIONAL, INC. $2,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,875.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
